Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clustead_deploy -o ConnectTimeout=30 root@211.188.48.124 'echo "=== nanum font in image? ==="; docker compose -f /root/clustead/docker-compose.app-only.yml exec -T app ls /usr/share/fonts/truetype/nanum/ 2>&1 | head -5; echo "=== wait app ready ==="; for i in $\(seq 1 20\); do c=$\(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:8000/healthz\); if [ "$c" = "200" ]; then echo "READY ~$\(\(i*4\)\)s"; break; fi; sleep 4; done')

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/clustead_deploy -o ConnectTimeout=25 root@211.188.48.124 'echo "=== container stats \(1shot\) ==="; docker stats --no-stream --format "{{.Name}} CPU={{.CPUPerc}} MEM={{.MemUsage}}" 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "=== /result timing \(warm\) ==="; for n in 1 2 3; do curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  /result attempt$n: %{time_total}s \(HTTP %{http_code}\)\\n" "http://127.0.0.1:8000/result?apartment=%ED%97%AC%EB%A6%AC%EC%98%A4%EC%8B%9C%ED%8B%B0&gu=%EC%86%A1%ED%8C%8C%EA%B5%AC&dong=%EA%B0%80%EB%9D%BD%EB%8F%99"; done; echo ""; echo "=== /og timing \(cached vs new\) ==="; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "  /og cached: %{time_total}s\\n" "http://127.0.0.1:8000/og/apartments/%EC%86%A1%ED%8C%8C%EA%B5%AC/%EA%B0%80%EB%9D%BD%EB%8F%99/%ED%97%AC%EB%A6%AC%EC%98%A4%EC%8B%9C%ED%8B%B0"')
